resources.string: Could not open storage settings. Please grant access manually.
Could not open battery settings. Please exempt Virga manually.
Sync your phone\'s storage — including the SD card — to cloud providers using a bundled rclone engine. No tracking, no accounts, just sync.
Sync your phone\'s storage to cloud providers using a bundled rclone engine. No tracking, no accounts, just sync. (SD-card access may be restricted on the Play Store build.)
Virga needs filesystem access to sync your local folders. On Android 11+ this is the \"All files access\" permission; below that it\'s the standard storage permission. Tap Next to grant access.
Virga reads files from the standard media folders the system exposes to apps. Picking individual folders may prompt for additional access. Tap Next to continue.

Some manufacturers aggressively kill background apps, which can stop scheduled syncs. Tap Next, then choose \"Allow\" when Android asks whether to let Virga keep running in the background. Android\'s prompt mentions battery use, but allowing it is what keeps your scheduled syncs from being killed. See dontkillmyapp.com for device-specific tips.

A cloud account (called a "remote") connects Virga to Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive, and more. A sync task copies files between a folder on your phone and a remote.\n\nOn the Remotes tab, tap Add cloud account to connect a provider, then create a sync task. You can also import an existing rclone.conf file from your desktop. Tap Get started.

string-array.name: release_notes_0_3_0
string-array.item: Create a new destination folder right from the folder picker
Test a remote\'s connectivity on demand from its card menu
Importing a config now warns you before it replaces your remotes
Old per-run sync logs are pruned automatically, so they no longer grow without bound

string-array.name: release_notes_0_2_0
string-array.item: Configure any rclone provider — Box, Dropbox, OneDrive, Google Drive, pCloud, and more
Sign in with OAuth, or bring your own credentials
Daemon-mediated OAuth for providers without a bundled sign-in
Add crypt and wrapper remotes (union, alias, and others)
Import and export your rclone config
Backups now continue past unreadable files and report an error summary instead of stopping

string-array.name: release_notes_0_1_0
string-array.item: New Home dashboard with sync status and lifetime stats
Refreshed app icon, provider marks, and Settings
More reliable encrypted-config handling and a keyboard-free launch

resources.string: Use your biometric or device credential to unlock
